title: codereview pass 1/3: signed_data docstring update
description: Reviewed python/src/lichen/announce/messages.py:113-150 after docstring edit for current_channel. Finding: docstring now accurately describes byte layout and CCP-9 binding. However, C implementation in lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/announce.c:533 still uses 'rx_channel' in comment while Python uses current_channel. Inconsistency remains. Also, test_known_wire_format in test_messages.py does not assert current_channel byte at offset 93. P2 consistency. Tagged codereview. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-gnxq
close_reason: Fixed via test update and docstring
